name: Lemon Drops -by Judy
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit. Line cookie sheets with parchment paper or grease them lightly.
In a large bowl, cream the butter and confectioner's sugar using an electric mixer until smooth.
Add the egg yolk, fresh lemon juice, and lemon zest; beat until well combined.
Gradually add flour and beat until the dough is smooth and holds together.
Form the dough into 1-inch balls and place them about 2 inches apart on prepared sheets. Flatten each ball with the flat bottom of a glass dipped in granulated sugar to prevent sticking.
Bake cookies in the middle of the oven for about 13 minutes, or until they are barely golden brown.
Transfer cookies to wire racks to cool completely.
Dip the tops of each cookie into a glaze made from equal parts confectioner's sugar and fresh lemon juice. Allow the cookies to cool completely before storing them in airtight containers for up to 1 week at room temperature or in the freezer for up to 2 months.
